text.title: Glossary Management (Living Doc) Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the glossary-management-living-doc methodology end-to-end.

step.name: intake
step.action: Single intake channel; capture term + scope + first usage example.

step.name: define
step.action: Maintainer drafts definition with examples; status=proposed.

step.name: resolve-conflicts
step.action: If conflicting definition exists, run conflict-resolution protocol.

step.name: publish-canonical
step.action: Status=canonical; attach propagation hooks to code/tests/macros.

step.name: audit-and-deprecate
step.action: Weekly term-usage audit; deprecate ghosts with replaced_by.
step.decision-gate: Validate against the output contract before declaring done; if invalid, loop back to the failing step.
